# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
    "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2015-01-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
    "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
   "resources": [
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "2015-07-01",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Contributor')]",
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId,'/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]",
                "principalId": "[parameters('principalId')]",
                "scope": "[subscription().id]"
            }
        }
    ]
}
{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/subscriptionDeploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "principalId": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(parameters('principalId'), 'Contributor', subscription().subscriptionId)]",
      "scope": "[subscription().subscriptionId]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('principalId')]"
      }
    }
  ]
}
